tasks.label: typecheck
tasks.detail: Type-check only (tsc --noEmit) — fastest feedback loop, no build output

tasks.label: build
tasks.detail: Production build (tsc + vite build) — outputs to dist/

tasks.label: dev-server-bg
tasks.detail: Start Vite dev server in background (localhost:5173) — used as preLaunchTask

tasks.label: test:coverage
tasks.detail: Run tests with V8 coverage — generates coverage/index.html report

tasks.label: lint:unused
tasks.detail: Knip — find dead code, unused exports, and missing dependencies

tasks.label: validate (full)
tasks.detail: Full CI pipeline: tsc + knip + vitest + vite build — run before committing

tasks.label: pre-commit check
tasks.detail: Quick pre-commit gate: typecheck → lint:unused (no tests/build)

tasks.label: check:coverage
tasks.detail: Flag changed files below 50% coverage threshold
